metadata.title: No more flickering inline math
metadata.description: No more flickering inline math Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned on, braces won't be inserted in tables. Decorations & atomic ranges are enabled regardless of this setting.
ast.target: 如果开启，表格中将不会插入大括号。无论此设置如何，装饰和原子范围都会启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option can be helpful for avoiding some strange behavior occurring when using IME inputs after escaping from a math block with the Latex Suite plugin's tabout feature.
ast.target: 此选项有助于避免在使用 Latex Suite 插件的 tabout 功能从数学块中退出后，使用 IME 输入时出现的一些奇怪行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned on, decorations to hide braces adjacent to dollar signs are disabled. This is especially useful when you want to see what this plugin does under the hood.
ast.target: 如果开启，将禁用隐藏美元符号旁边大括号的装饰。当你想查看此插件在底层是如何运作时，这尤其有用。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用 IME 输入时禁用

ast.name: text
ast.source: If turned on, atomic ranges to treat each of "
ast.target: 如果开启，将禁用将每个 \

ast.name: text
ast.target: \" 视为单个字符的原子范围。
